intro_line: FYS Mallorca caught my eye as a serious brokerage with deep roots in the Balearics, and we'd love to be considered for any captain/skipper opening in your fleet or network.

We've followed Boat Charter Mallorca and like the way you handle direct-to-guest charter in the Palma area — exactly the kind of operation we're looking for after 3 seasons running daily charters out of Split/Vis.

We'd like to register with Burgess as a Captain + Stewardess couple available for immediate placement. Croatian, ready to relocate to Palma, open to any Med role for the rest of 2026 + Caribbean winter 2026/27.
We'd like to register with Fraser as a Captain + Stewardess couple available for immediate placement. Croatian, ready to relocate to Palma now.
We're applying for any open roles at your Palma base — bareboat skipper backup, skippered charter, catamaran crew, anything in your fleet.
Pitter's Real Club Nautico Palma base is exactly the kind of operation we want to grow into after 3 seasons running daily charters in Croatia.
We're looking for the rest of the 2026 Palma season — day-tour, sunset cruises, charter weeks, anything in your operation. We've spent the past 3 seasons running exactly this kind of work in Croatia.
MaksyBoats' luxury fleet caught my eye — that's exactly the level we want to step up to after 3 seasons running daily charters in Croatia.
We're applying together for any opening across the Super Yacht Charter Mallorca fleet. Available immediately, ready to relocate to Palma now.
Your private tours / events / incentives model is exactly what we want — after 3 seasons of daily charter and guest-transfer work in Croatia, we're ready to bring that experience to Palma.

Your traditional llaüt 'El Gordito' operation caught my eye — I've actually skippered a traditional 17m wooden Croatian vessel (the Blaga, heavy-displacement, no thrusters), so I know exactly the kind of careful handling these boats demand.
